title: gonolobus murphyae
intro: Gonolobus murphyae is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and wounds. The health benefits of Gonolobus murphyae include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Gonolobus murphyae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine in Central and South America.
